rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH

rulings.Rulings: Appearance Required. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, March 14, 2018.
